revision.text:
[[ja:初姫神社]] {{Infobox religious building | name = Hatsuhime Shrine | native_name = 初姫神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hatsuhime Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.081776|138.948661}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Hatsuhime Shrine'''|初姫神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province|ja|伊豆国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11380552|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province}} ** Series ordinal: 64 ** P155: {{ill|Q135039675|ltq=Q135039675|qid=Q135039675|1=Hikitachikarano- Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Ametsuseno- Shrine|lt=Ametsuseno- Shrine|qid=Q135039676|1=Ametsuseno- Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q860928|ltq=Q860928|qid=Q860928|1=Izu Province}} * {{ill|Tagata District, Shizuoka|lt=Tagata district|en|Tagata District, Shizuoka|fr|District de Tagata|id|Distrik Tagata, Shizuoka|it|Distretto di Tagata|ja|田方郡|ko|다가타군|pl|Powiat Tagata|uk|Повіт Таґата|zh|田方郡|qid=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}} * {{ill|Q1203533|ltq=Q1203533|qid=Q1203533|1=Kannami}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.081776|138.948661}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181632 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917316|ltq=Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * はつひめじんじゃ == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県田方郡函南町仁田587', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:初姫神社]] {{wikidata link|Q134926458}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Hatsuhime Shrine |Image = [[File:初姫神社(函南町仁田).jpg|250px]]
Torii gate and worship hall
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|4|54|N|138|56|55.5|E}}}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|qid=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}}{{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|qid=Q1203533|1=Kannami}} Nitta 587 |Coordinates = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|4|54|N|138|56|55.5|E|display=inline,title}} |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Hatsuhime Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|35|4|54|N|138|56|55.5|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |Enshrined deity = Kanamura Iohomurahime no Mikoto |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}; former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |Founded = |Main hall = |Alternative name = |Pilgrimage status = |Annual festival = Early October |Rituals = }} '''Hatsuhime Shrine''' (はつひめじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in the Nitta district of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|qid=Q1203533|1=Kannami}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|qid=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402075 Hatsuhime Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines === Overview === It is identified with '''Kanamura Iohomurahime no Mikoto Shrine''', a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}.On-site shrine history plaque There are {{ill|lt=munafuda|Q8008834|qid=Q8008834|1=Munafuda}} (ridge tags) dating from {{ill|lt=Bunroku|Q1373039|qid=Q1373039|1=Bunroku}} 5 (12th month), {{ill|lt=Genna (Japan)|Q635245|qid=Q635245|lt=Genna|1=Genna}} 3, {{ill|lt=Jōō|Q1145081|qid=Q1145081|1=Jōō (Edo period)}} 3, {{ill|lt=Jōkyō|Q1146221|qid=Q1146221|1=Jōkyō}} 4, and others.Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Gazetteer In September {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|qid=Q7757|1=1873}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6), it was ranked as a gōsha, and on June 21, {{ill|lt=1907|Q2048|qid=Q2048|1=1907}} (Meiji 40) it was designated a shrine authorized to receive offerings of sacred food and paper offerings from the state. === Enshrined deity === * Kanamura Iohomurahime no Mikoto === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402075 Hatsuhime Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hatsuhime Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hatsuhime Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hatsuhime Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Buildings in Kannanmachi]] [[Category:History of Kannanmachi]]
